rationale.R1.1: 'Reframe the conceptual story' is quintessentially a thesis/contribution-claim task. The artifact fractures its own identity across three incompatible frames — a constrained-optimization method, a first-sublinear-regret theory result, and a benchmark suite — and the delegation is load-bearing on choosing and articulating a unified conceptual frame. Failure to reconstruct the central claim invalidates the delegation entirely.
rationale.R1.5: Any reframing of the thesis necessarily propagates into narrative arc: the sequence in which method, theory, and benchmark are introduced and weighted must be restructured to support whichever frame is chosen as primary. This is central but derivative — it executes the reframing rather than defining it.
